frames.narrationSummary: Start recursion at the root node 3.
Node 3 is not null, so this call must ask both children for their depth.
Descend into the left child at node 9.
Node 9 is not null, so this call must ask both children for their depth.
Enter left child recursion with null.
dfs(null) returns 0 because an empty subtree contributes no depth.
Return base depth 0 to the waiting parent call.
Store leftDepth = 0 after the left subtree returns.
Enter right child recursion with null.
dfs(null) returns 0 because an empty subtree contributes no depth.
Return base depth 0 to the waiting parent call.
Store rightDepth = 0 after the right subtree returns.
Compute depth at node 9: 1 + max(0, 0) = 1.
Return depth 1 to the parent call.
Store leftDepth = 1 after the left subtree returns.
Descend into the right child at node 20.
Node 20 is not null, so this call must ask both children for their depth.
Descend into the left child at node 15.
Node 15 is not null, so this call must ask both children for their depth.
Enter left child recursion with null.
dfs(null) returns 0 because an empty subtree contributes no depth.
Return base depth 0 to the waiting parent call.
Store leftDepth = 0 after the left subtree returns.
Enter right child recursion with null.
dfs(null) returns 0 because an empty subtree contributes no depth.
Return base depth 0 to the waiting parent call.
Store rightDepth = 0 after the right subtree returns.
Compute depth at node 15: 1 + max(0, 0) = 1.
Return depth 1 to the parent call.
Store leftDepth = 1 after the left subtree returns.
Descend into the right child at node 7.
Node 7 is not null, so this call must ask both children for their depth.
Enter left child recursion with null.
dfs(null) returns 0 because an empty subtree contributes no depth.
Return base depth 0 to the waiting parent call.
Store leftDepth = 0 after the left subtree returns.
Enter right child recursion with null.
dfs(null) returns 0 because an empty subtree contributes no depth.
Return base depth 0 to the waiting parent call.
Store rightDepth = 0 after the right subtree returns.
Compute depth at node 7: 1 + max(0, 0) = 1.
Return depth 1 to the parent call.
Store rightDepth = 1 after the right subtree returns.
Compute depth at node 20: 1 + max(1, 1) = 2.
Return depth 2 to the parent call.
Store rightDepth = 2 after the right subtree returns.
Compute depth at node 3: 1 + max(1, 2) = 3.
Return depth 3 to the parent call.
The wrapper returns maximum depth 3.
